changeSet.author: hephaestus
changeSet.comment: Backfill git_commit.author_id for rows where CommitAuthorResolver's new Strategy 1 (direct email, case-insensitive) should have matched. Provider-scoped to avoid cross-provider ambiguity.
changeSet.sql: UPDATE git_commit c SET author_id = u.id FROM repository r, "user" u WHERE c.author_id IS NULL AND c.author_email IS NOT NULL AND c.repository_id = r.id AND u.provider_id = r.provider_id AND LOWER(u.email) = LOWER(c.author_email);

changeSet.author: hephaestus
changeSet.comment: Backfill git_commit.committer_id via direct email match (provider-scoped).
changeSet.sql: UPDATE git_commit c SET committer_id = u.id FROM repository r, "user" u WHERE c.committer_id IS NULL AND c.committer_email IS NOT NULL AND c.repository_id = r.id AND u.provider_id = r.provider_id AND LOWER(u.email) = LOWER(c.committer_email);

changeSet.author: hephaestus
changeSet.comment: Backfill git_commit.author_id using the new Strategy 3 in CommitAuthorResolver: email local-part as login (TUM/LRZ convention, e.g. ge27coy@mytum.de -> login ge27coy). Only applies when: * local-part is a single login-shaped token (no dot, no plus) * email is NOT a GitLab bot noreply (group_X_bot_Y@noreply.*, project_X_bot_Y@noreply.*) Provider-scoped to avoid cross-provider ambiguity.
changeSet.sql: UPDATE git_commit c SET author_id = u.id FROM repository r, "user" u WHERE c.author_id IS NULL AND c.author_email IS NOT NULL AND c.repository_id = r.id AND u.provider_id = r.provider_id AND split_part(c.author_email, '@', 1) ~ '^[A-Za-z0-9_-]+$' AND c.author_email !~* '^(group|project)_[0-9]+_bot[_a-z0-9-]*@noreply\..+$' AND LOWER(u.login) = LOWER(split_part(c.author_email, '@', 1));

changeSet.author: hephaestus
changeSet.comment: Backfill git_commit.committer_id via email local-part as login (provider-scoped).
changeSet.sql: UPDATE git_commit c SET committer_id = u.id FROM repository r, "user" u WHERE c.committer_id IS NULL AND c.committer_email IS NOT NULL AND c.repository_id = r.id AND u.provider_id = r.provider_id AND split_part(c.committer_email, '@', 1) ~ '^[A-Za-z0-9_-]+$' AND c.committer_email !~* '^(group|project)_[0-9]+_bot[_a-z0-9-]*@noreply\..+$' AND LOWER(u.login) = LOWER(split_part(c.committer_email, '@', 1));
